title: Dear Etranger
original_title: 幼な子われらに生まれ
overview: Makoto Tanaka is 40-years-old and has remarried. His wife is Nanae and they care for 2 daughters from Nanae's prior marriage. Makoto tries to have an ordinary family. Nanae then becomes pregnant. Afterwards, things begin to change among the family members.

trailers.title: 映画『幼な子われらに生まれ』本予告

trailer_groups.title: 映画『幼な子われらに生まれ』本予告

ja.title: 映画『幼な子われらに生まれ』本予告
